title: Support - Tenant info persists after updating the app
scenario: Tenant info persists unchanged after updating the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Register on a tenant (e.g., via Account or login flow).
3. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
5. Install a new version of the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., via app store or sideload).
7. Navigate again to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
expected: Tenant info should be cleared or reset after updating the app, as tenant registration is tied to the app session/installation.
